paper.title: The nearest extreme velocity stars among Gaia DR2 high proper motion stars

extraction.summary: 本文为 RNAAS 简报，从 Gaia DR2 高自行 (μ>60 mas/yr) 恒星中筛选极端切向速度候选体。通过质量筛选 (u, gofAL, excess_noise_sig) 及视差显著性 (ϖ>5σ_ϖ) 后获得6颗 vt,g > 700 km/s（超过本地银河系逃逸速度 580±63 km/s）的高优先级候选体。这些星仅基于 Gaia DR2 视差和自行（仅2D切向速度），除 D6-2 外均无 RV 数据。论文明确指出这些为 'possibly unbound' 候选体，需要后续 RV 测量确认。6 颗候选体全部纳入。

method_chain.summary: Gaia DR2：约180万颗 μ>60 mas/yr 且 ϖ>3σ_ϖ 的高自行恒星。
outputs: 初始高自行样本 (~1.8 million stars)

source_refs.context: Selection of HPM stars with μ>60 mas/yr and ϖ>3σ_ϖ

method_chain.summary: 计算银心静止系切向速度 vt_g（修正太阳运动，LSR=235 km/s）。选取 vt_g > 700 km/s 的天体（远高于本地逃逸速度 580±63 km/s）。得到 109 个天体。
inputs: Gaia DR2 proper motions and parallaxes

source_refs.context: vt_g calculation and vt_g>700 km/s threshold

method_chain.summary: 应用 Gaia DR2 质量判据：astrometric_unit_weight_error u, BP/RP 测光可靠性、astrometric_gof_al<3, astrometric_excess_noise_sig≤2。从109个过滤至39个候选体。

source_refs.context: Quality criteria filtering from 109 to 39 candidates

method_chain.summary: 仅保留 ϖ>5σ_ϖ 的高显著性视差天体，得到最终 6 颗高优先级候选体。

source_refs.context: D6-2 = NLTT 51732, hypervelocity white dwarf from Shen+2018

inclusion_assessment.summary: D6-2 (Gaia DR2 1798008584396457088): 该星为 Shen+2018 分类的超高速白矮星候选体。本文将其列为 vt_g 最高的候选体之一 (1248±122 km/s)，但指出其 Gaia DR2 质量参数 (u=1.13, gofAL=2.7, excess_noise_sig=1.8) 接近最大允许值、visibility_periods_used=9 偏低，且 Shen+2018 测得 RV=0 km/s，因此本文将其视为 'doubtful candidate'。仅2D切向速度，无可靠RV。
inclusion_assessment.confidence_reason: Gaia DR2 quality parameters marginal (u, gofAL near limits), RV=0 km/s from Shen+2018 renders unbound status uncertain, paper itself labels as doubtful. 2D-only kinematics without reliable 6D constraint.

source_refs.context: D6-2: doubtful candidate, quality parameters close to max allowed, zero RV
Further RV measurements will clarify possibly unbound status
Six high-priority candidates with vt_g>700 km/s and ϖ>5σ_ϖ

inclusion_assessment.summary: Gaia DR2 1540013339194597376: 本文认为该星为最佳候选体 ('probably the best high-speed star candidate')，因其 Gaia DR2 质量参数优异 (u=0.98, gofAL=-0.4, excess_noise_sig=0.0, visibility_periods_used=15)。也是 Bromley+2018 发现的最近高速星候选体。vt_g=917±104 km/s 超过逃逸速度。仅2D切向速度，无RV。
inclusion_assessment.confidence_reason: Best quality candidate: excellent Gaia DR2 astrometric quality (low u, gofAL, excess_noise_sig), 15 visibility periods. vt_g=917 km/s well above escape velocity. 2D-only; RV needed for 6D confirmation.

source_refs.context: Probably the best high-speed star candidate, also found by Bromley+2018
Further RV measurements will clarify possibly unbound status

inclusion_assessment.summary: Gaia DR2 6698855754225352192: vt_g=733±99 km/s，超过逃逸速度。该星也是 Bromley+2018 发现的近邻高速星候选体。Gaia DR2 质量参数良好 (u=1.02, gofAL=0.3, vpu=13)。仅2D切向速度，无RV。
inclusion_assessment.confidence_reason: vt_g=733 km/s above escape velocity. Good Gaia DR2 quality. Also found by Bromley+2018. 2D-only; RV needed.

source_refs.context: Further RV measurements will clarify possibly unbound status

inclusion_assessment.summary: Gaia DR2 3841458366321558656: vt_g=978±220 km/s，误差较大但仍超过逃逸速度。visibility_periods_used=8 偏低。仅2D切向速度，无RV。
inclusion_assessment.confidence_reason: vt_g=978 km/s above escape velocity but large error (220 km/s). Low visibility_periods_used=8. 2D-only; RV needed.

source_refs.context: Further RV measurements will clarify possibly unbound status

inclusion_assessment.summary: Gaia DR2 3593446274383096448: vt_g=855±156 km/s，超过逃逸速度。Gaia DR2 质量参数良好 (u=0.92, gofAL=-1.2, excess_noise_sig=0.0)。仅2D切向速度，无RV。
inclusion_assessment.confidence_reason: vt_g=855 km/s above escape velocity. Good Gaia DR2 quality. 2D-only; RV needed for 6D confirmation.

source_refs.context: Further RV measurements will clarify possibly unbound status

inclusion_assessment.summary: Gaia DR2 6097052289696317952: vt_g=1617±347 km/s 为样本最高，但误差极大。visibility_periods_used=9 偏低。该星为本样本中最远天体 (ϖ=0.17 mas)。论文标注其 'slightly questionable'。仅2D切向速度，无RV。
inclusion_assessment.confidence_reason: Highest vt_g=1617 km/s but very large error (347 km/s, ~21%). Low visibility_periods_used=9. Paper labels 'slightly questionable'. Bright G=13.53 suggests interesting object. 2D-only; RV needed.

source_refs.context: Most distant candidate with highest vt_g, slightly questionable

candidate_groups_considered.description: 初步筛选阶段 vt_g > 700 km/s 的 109 个天体。经 Gaia DR2 质量判据过滤至 39 个。
candidate_groups_considered.reason: 该组天体未通过 Gaia DR2 质量判据筛选（astrometric_unit_weight_error, BP/RP 测光, astrometric_gof_al<3, astrometric_excess_noise_sig≤2），或者未通过视差显著性筛选（ϖ>5σ_ϖ）。仅最终 6 颗通过所有筛选的天体被纳入候选体列表。

candidate_groups_considered.description: Shen+2018 识别的 3 颗超高速白矮星候选体 (D6-1, D6-2, D6-3)。其中仅 D6-2 通过本文筛选（但被标注为 doubtful），D6-1 和 D6-3 因视差不够显著 (ϖ<5σ_ϖ) 被排除。

source_refs.context: Three HVR WDs from Shen+2018, only D6-2 passes all quality cuts
